original_statement: which team has the most draws/wins combined together?
mutated_statement: which group has the most ties/victories combined together while also having the fewest ties/victories combined together?
mutation_analysis: [实体泛化] + [词汇替换(同义)] + [逻辑矛盾/条件添加]: "team" 被泛化为 "group" (team→group) | "draws/wins" 被替换为同义词 "ties/victories" (draws/wins→ties/victories) | 添加了与原目标互相矛盾的附加条件 "同时也有最少..."，将“最多”与“最少”同时要求 (most combined→most combined while also having the fewest combined)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和chain中的simple_query说明可识别关键事实：judge_thought写道“ The question asks for the team with the highest and the team with the lowest combined total...”且simple_query的thought明确列出“因此...最多和最少分别是Saracens...和Worcester...”。Agent直接计算 wins+draws，返回最大与最小两个实体，未对变异问题中“同时既为最多又为最少”的逻辑矛盾作任何识别、解释或澄清，也未尝试修正问题或询问用户。因此将其归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”：代理在执行上忽略了互斥的附加条件，仅基于可行子集（计算并报告最大与最小）完成任务。
